CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CLOSET FACTORY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-26-2009 AT 10:00AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ODIER, DEBORAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAFELE AMERICA CO. $4,680.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,895.00, FOR DESIGN OR INSTALLATION DEFECT IN BED RETRACTION MECHANISM. DEFENDANT CLOSET FACTORY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE DUE TO PENDING BANKRUPTCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
